items.abstract_zh: 利用推测执行来泄露机密的推测执行攻击引起了工业界和学术界的严重关注。它们主要利用错误推测和压缩指令（即瞬态指令）留下的微架构状态上的隐蔽或侧通道。大多数此类攻击都针对缓存状态。现有的基于缓存的针对推测执行攻击的防御分为两类：隐形攻击和撤消攻击。大多数隐形防御都会缓冲推测指令的执行元数据，并且仅当推测执行的指令被确定时才将它们放入缓存中。由于错误推测很少见，撤消防御允许推测指令修改缓存状态。一旦发生错误推测，它们会将缓存状态回滚到执行瞬态指令之前的状态。然而，最近发现隐形防御因投机干扰攻击而变得不安全。这就需要对 Undo 防御进行深入的安全检查，以防止推测执行攻击。在本文中，我们提出 unXpec 作为针对基于 Undo 的安全推测的第一个攻击。它利用了通过撤消防御的回滚操作展示的依赖于秘密的计时通道。具体地，回滚过程需要使由瞬时指令带入高速缓存的高速缓存行无效以及由瞬时加载的数据从高速缓存恢复逐出的高速缓存行。这开辟了一个通道，通过回滚涉及大量失效和恢复与否之间的时间差异来编码秘密。我们进一步利用驱逐集来执行更多的恢复操作。这会产生更长的回滚时间，从而产生更大的依赖于秘密的时序差异。我们通过开源 CleanupSpec（一种代表性的撤消解决方案）演示了计时通道。单个瞬态负载可以触发 22 个周期（无逐出集）与 32 个周期（有逐出集）的秘密相关时序差异，这足以用于构建用于推测执行攻击的隐蔽通道。我们在启用 CleanupSpec 的 gem5 模拟器上运行 unXpec。结果表明，unXpec能够以140Kbps的高速率泄密，准确率超过90%。简单地强制执行恒定时间回滚来缓解 unXpec 可能会导致超过 70% 的性能开销。

items.title: Enabling High-Quality Uncertainty Quantification in a PIM Designed for Bayesian Neural Network.
items.abstract: Uncertainty quantification measures the prediction uncertainty of a neural network facing out-of-training-distribution samples. Bayesian Neural Networks (BNNs) can provide high-quality uncertainty quantification by introducing specific noise to the weights during inference. To accelerate BNN inference, ReRAM processing-in-memory (PIM) architecture is a competitive solution to provide both high-efficient computing and in-situ noise generation at the same time. However, there normally exists a huge gap between the generated noise in PIM hardware and that required by a BNN model. We demonstrate that the quality of uncertainty quantification is substantially degraded due to this gap. To solve this problem, we propose a holistic framework called W2W-PIM. We first introduce an efficient method to generate noise in ReRAM PIM design according to the demand of a BNN model. In addition, the PIM architecture is carefully modified to enable the noise generation and evaluate uncertainty quality. Moreover, a calibration unit is further introduced to reduce the noise gap caused by imperfection of the noise model. Comprehensive evaluation results demonstrate that W2W-PIM framework can achieve high-quality uncertainty quantification and high energy-efficiency at the same time.
items.abstract_zh: 不确定性量化衡量神经网络面对训练分布外样本的预测不确定性。贝叶斯神经网络 (BNN) 可以通过在推理过程中向权重引入特定噪声来提供高质量的不确定性量化。为了加速 BNN 推理，ReRAM 内存处理 (PIM) 架构是一种具有竞争力的解决方案，可以同时提供高效计算和原位噪声生成。然而，PIM 硬件生成的噪声与 BNN 模型所需的噪声之间通常存在巨大差距。我们证明，由于这种差距，不确定性量化的质量大幅下降。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个名为 W2W-PIM 的整体框架。我们首先根据 BNN 模型的需求，介绍一种在 ReRAM PIM 设计中产生噪声的有效方法。此外，PIM 架构经过精心修改，可生成噪声并评估不确定性质量。此外，还引入了校准单元，以减少由于噪声模型不完善而导致的噪声间隙。综合评价结果表明，W2W-PIM框架能够同时实现高质量的不确定性量化和高能效。

items.title: LISA: Graph Neural Network based Portable Mapping on Spatial Accelerators.
items.abstract: Spatial accelerators, such as Coarse-Grained Reconfigurable Arrays (CGRA), provide a promising pathway to scale the performance and power efficiency of computing systems. These accelerators depend on effective compilers to take advantage of the parallelism offered by the underlying architecture. Currently, the compilers are handcrafted for spatial accelerators, which is challenging from time to market perspective, especially with the rapid increase of diverse accelerators. In this paper, we present a portable compilation framework, called LISA, that can be tuned automatically to generate quality mapping for varied spatial accelerators. Our key contribution is to automatically identify the impact of the dataflow graph (DFG) structure characteristics (representing an application) on the mapping for a new accelerator. Towards this end, we abstract the DFG structure in graph attributes, use Graph Neural Network (GNN) to analyze the graph attributes, and identify the mapping impact for an accelerator architecture with an all-encompassing global view. Finally, we augment a simulated annealing-based mapping approach to take into account the impact of DFG structure in guiding the placement of the dataflow graph nodes and the routing of the dependencies on the accelerator. Our experimental evaluation concretely demonstrates the substantial benefit of our approach compared to the state-of-the-art solutions.
items.abstract_zh: 空间加速器，例如粗粒度可重构阵列（CGRA），为扩展计算系统的性能和功效提供了一条有前途的途径。这些加速器依赖于有效的编译器来利用底层架构提供的并行性。目前，编译器是为空间加速器手工制作的，从时间和市场角度来看，这都具有挑战性，特别是随着各种加速器的快速增加。在本文中，我们提出了一个名为 LISA 的便携式编译框架，它可以自动调整以生成各种空间加速器的质量映射。我们的主要贡献是自动识别数据流图（DFG）结构特征（代表应用程序）对新加速器映射的影响。为此，我们抽象了图属性中的DFG结构，使用图神经网络（GNN）来分析图属性，并以全方位的全局视角识别加速器架构的映射影响。最后，我们增强了基于模拟退火的映射方法，以考虑 DFG 结构在指导数据流图节点的放置和加速器上的依赖项的路由方面的影响。我们的实验评估具体证明了我们的方法与最先进的解决方案相比的实质性优势。

items.title: Compiler-Driven Simulation of Reconfigurable Hardware Accelerators.
items.abstract: As customized accelerator design has become increasingly popular to keep up with the demand for high performance computing, it poses challenges for modern simulator design to adapt to such a large variety of accelerators. Existing simulators tend to two extremes: low-level and general approaches, such as RTL simulation, that can model any hardware but require substantial effort and long execution times; and higher-level application-specific models that can be much faster and easier to use but require one-off engineering effort.This work proposes a compiler-driven simulation workflow that can model configurable hardware accelerator. The key idea is to separate structure representation from simulation by developing an intermediate language that can flexibly represent a wide variety of hardware constructs. We design the Event Queue (EQueue) dialect of MLIR, a dialect that can model arbitrary hardware accelerators with explicit data movement and distributed event-based control; we also implement a generic simulation engine to model EQueue programs with hybrid MLIR dialects representing different abstraction levels. We demonstrate two case studies of EQueue-implemented accelerators: the systolic array of convolution and SIMD processors in a modern FPGA. In the former we show EQueue simulation is as accurate as a state-of-the-art simulator, while offering higher extensibility and lower iteration cost via compiler passes. In the latter we demonstrate our simulation flow can guide designer efficiently improve their design using visualizable simulation outputs.
items.abstract_zh: 为了满足高性能计算的需求，定制加速器设计变得越来越流行，这对现代模拟器设计适应如此多样化的加速器提出了挑战。现有的模拟器往往走向两个极端：低级和通用方法，例如 RTL 模拟，可以对任何硬件进行建模，但需要大量工作和较长的执行时间；以及更高级别的特定于应用程序的模型，这些模型可以更快、更容易使用，但需要一次性的工程工作。这项工作提出了一种编译器驱动的仿真工作流程，可以对可配置的硬件加速器进行建模。关键思想是通过开发一种可以灵活表示各种硬件构造的中间语言，将结构表示与仿真分开。我们设计了 MLIR 的事件队列（EQueue）方言，该方言可以通过显式数据移动和基于分布式事件的控制来建模任意硬件加速器；我们还实现了一个通用模拟引擎，以使用代表不同抽象级别的混合 MLIR 方言对 EQueue 程序进行建模。我们演示了 EQueue 实现的加速器的两个案例研究：现代 FPGA 中的卷积和 SIMD 处理器的脉动阵列。在前者中，我们展示了 EQueue 模拟与最先进的模拟器一样准确，同时通过编译器通道提供更高的可扩展性和更低的迭代成本。在后者中，我们展示了我们的仿真流程可以指导设计人员使用可视化的仿真输出有效地改进他们的设计。

items.title: Not All SWAPs Have the Same Cost: A Case for Optimization-Aware Qubit Routing.
items.abstract: Despite rapid advances in quantum computing technologies, the qubit connectivity limitation remains to be a critical challenge. Both near-term NISQ quantum computers and relatively long-term scalable quantum architectures do not offer full connectivity. As a result, quantum circuits may not be directly executed on quantum hardware, and a quantum compiler needs to perform qubit routing to make the circuit compatible with the device layout. During the qubit routing step, the compiler inserts SWAP gates and performs circuit transformations. Given the connectivity topology of the target hardware, there are typically multiple qubit routing candidates. The state-of-the-art compilers use a cost function to evaluate the number of SWAP gates for different routes and then select the one with the minimum number of SWAP gates. After qubit routing, the quantum compiler performs gate optimizations upon the circuit with the newly inserted SWAP gates.In this paper, we observe that the aforementioned qubit routing is not optimal, and qubit routing should not be independent on subsequent gate optimizations. We find that with the consideration of gate optimizations, not all of the SWAP gates have the same basis-gate cost. These insights lead to the development of our qubit routing algorithm, NASSC (Not All Swaps have the Same Cost). NASSC is the first algorithm that considers the subsequent optimizations during the routing step. Our optimization-aware qubit routing leads to better routing decisions and benefits subsequent optimizations. We also propose a new optimization-aware decomposition for the inserted SWAP gates. Our experiments show that the routing overhead compiled with our routing algorithm is reduced by up to 69.30% (21.30% on average) in the number of CNOT gates and up to 43.50% (7.61% on average) in the circuit depth compared with the state-of-the-art scheme, SABRE.
items.abstract_zh: 尽管量子计算技术取得了快速进步，但量子位连接限制仍然是一个严峻的挑战。近期的 NISQ 量子计算机和相对长期的可扩展量子架构都不提供完全连接。因此，量子电路可能无法直接在量子硬件上执行，并且量子编译器需要执行量子位路由以使电路与器件布局兼容。在量子位路由步骤中，编译器插入交换门并执行电路转换。给定目标硬件的连接拓扑，通常存在多个候选量子位路由。最先进的编译器使用成本函数来评估不同路由的 SWAP 门数量，然后选择 SWAP 门数量最少的一个。在量子位路由之后，量子编译器对新插入的交换门的电路进行门优化。在本文中，我们观察到上述量子位路由不是最优的，并且量子位路由不应该独立于后续的门优化。我们发现，考虑到门优化，并非所有的 SWAP 门都具有相同的基础门成本。这些见解促成了我们的量子位路由算法 NASSC（并非所有交换都具有相同成本）的开发。 NASSC 是第一个在路由步骤中考虑后续优化的算法。我们的优化感知量子位路由可以带来更好的路由决策，并有利于后续优化。我们还为插入的交换门提出了一种新的优化感知分解。我们的实验表明，与最先进的方案 SABRE 相比，使用我们的路由算法编译的路由开销在 CNOT 门的数量上减少了 69.30%（平均 21.30%），在电路深度上减少了 43.50%（平均 7.61%）。

items.title: S2TA: Exploiting Structured Sparsity for Energy-Efficient Mobile CNN Acceleration.
items.abstract: Exploiting sparsity is a key technique in accelerating quantized convolutional neural network (CNN) inference on mobile devices. Prior sparse CNN accelerators largely exploit unstructured sparsity and achieve significant speedups. Due to the unbounded, largely unpredictable sparsity patterns, however, exploiting unstructured sparsity requires complicated hardware design with significant energy and area overhead, which is particularly detrimental to mobile/IoT inference scenarios where energy and area efficiency are crucial.We propose to exploit structured sparsity, more specifically, Density Bound Block (DBB) sparsity for both weights and activations. DBB block tensors bound the maximum number of non-zeros per block. DBB thus exposes statically predictable sparsity patterns that enable lean sparsity-exploiting hardware and efficient memory access. We propose new hardware primitives to implement DBB sparsity for (static) weights and (dynamic) activations, respectively, with very low overheads.Building on top of the primitives, we describe S2TA, a systolic array-based CNN accelerator that exploits joint weight and activation DBB sparsity and new dimensions of data reuse unavailable on the traditional systolic array. S2TA in 16nm achieves more than 2× speedup and energy reduction compared to a strong baseline of a systolic array with zero-value clock gating, over five popular CNN benchmarks. Compared to two recent non-systolic sparse accelerators, Eyeriss v2 (65nm) and SparTen (45nm), S2TA in 65nm uses about 2.2× per and 3.1× less energy inference, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 利用稀疏性是加速移动设备上量化卷积神经网络 (CNN) 推理的关键技术。先前的稀疏 CNN 加速器主要利用非结构化稀疏性并实现显着的加速。然而，由于无界、很大程度上不可预测的稀疏性模式，利用非结构化稀疏性需要复杂的硬件设计，并具有大量的能量和面积开销，这对于能量和面积效率至关重要的移动/物联网推理场景尤其不利。我们建议利用结构化稀疏性，更具体地说，权重和激活的密度界限块（DBB）稀疏性。 DBB 块张量限制每个块非零的最大数量。因此，DBB 公开了静态可预测的稀疏模式，从而实现了精简的稀疏利用硬件和高效的内存访问。我们提出了新的硬件原语，以非常低的开销分别实现（静态）权重和（动态）激活的 DBB 稀疏性。在原语之上，我们描述了 S2TA，一种基于脉动阵列的 CNN 加速器，它利用联合权重和激活 DBB 稀疏性以及传统脉动阵列上无法实现的新数据重用维度。与具有零值时钟门控的脉动阵列的强大基线相比，16nm 的 S2TA 在五个流行的 CNN 基准测试中实现了超过 2 倍的加速和能耗降低。与最近的两款非收缩稀疏加速器 Eyeriss v2 (65nm) 和 SparTen (45nm) 相比，65nm 下的 S2TA 分别使用约 2.2 倍和 3.1 倍的能量推理。

items.title: Virtual Coset Coding for Encrypted Non-Volatile Memories with Multi-Level Cells.
items.abstract: Recently, Phase-Change Memory (PCM) has become a popular commercialized non-volatile memory (NVM), which has been deployed as a backing memory for DRAM main memory, secondary storage, or even as a DRAM main memory replacement. Like other NVMs, PCM has asymmetric access energy; writes dominate reads. When considering multilevel cells (MLC), this asymmetry can vary by an order of magnitude. Many schemes have been developed to take advantage of the asymmetric patterns of ‘0’s and ‘1’s in the data to reduce write energy. Because the memory is non-volatile, data can be recovered via physical attack or across system reboot cycles. To protect information stored in PCM against these attacks requires encryption. Unfortunately, most encryption algorithms scramble ‘0’s and ‘1’s in the data, effectively removing any patterns and negatively impacting schemes that leverage data bias and similarity to reduce write energy. In this paper, we introduce Virtual Coset Coding (VCC) as a workload-independent approach that reduces costly symbol transitions for storing encrypted data. VCC is based on two ideas. First, using coset encoding with random coset candidates, it is possible to effectively reduce the frequency of costly bit/symbol transitions when writing encrypted data. Second, a small set of random substrings can be used to achieve the same encoding efficiency as a large number of random coset candidates, but at a much lower encoding/decoding cost. Additionally, we demonstrate how VCC can be leveraged for energy reduction in combination with fault-mitigation and fault-tolerance to dramatically increase the lifetimes of endurance-limited NVMs, such as PCM. We evaluate the design of VCC and demonstrate that it can be implemented on-chip with only a nominal area overhead. VCC reduces dynamic energy by 22-28% while maintaining the same performance. Using our multi-objective optimization approach achieves at least a 36% improvement in lifetime over the state-of-the-art and at least a 50% improvement in lifetime vs. an unencoded memory, while maintaining its energy savings and system performance.
items.abstract_zh: 最近，相变存储器（PCM）已成为一种流行的商业化非易失性存储器（NVM），它已被部署为DRAM主存储器、辅助存储的后备存储器，甚至作为DRAM主存储器的替代品。与其他NVM一样，PCM具有不对称的访问能量；写主导读。当考虑多级单元 (MLC) 时，这种不对称性可能会发生一个数量级的变化。人们已经开发出许多方案来利用数据中“0”和“1”的不对称模式来减少写入能量。由于内存是非易失性的，因此可以通过物理攻击或跨系统重启周期恢复数据。为了保护存储在 PCM 中的信息免受这些攻击，需要加密。不幸的是，大多数加密算法都会扰乱数据中的“0”和“1”，从而有效地消除任何模式以及利用数据偏差和相似性来减少写入能量的负面影响方案。在本文中，我们引入虚拟陪集编码（VCC）作为一种独立于工作负载的方法，可减少存储加密数据时昂贵的符号转换。 VCC 基于两个想法。首先，使用具有随机陪集候选的陪集编码，可以有效地降低写入加密数据时昂贵的比特/符号转换的频率。其次，可以使用一小组随机子串来实现与大量随机陪集候选相同的编码效率，但编码/解码成本要低得多。此外，我们还演示了如何利用 VCC 来降低能耗，并结合故障缓解和容错功能，从而显着延长耐用性有限的 NVM（例如 PCM）的使用寿命。我们评估了 VCC 的设计，并证明它可以在片上实现，只需标称面积开销。 VCC 在保持相同性能的同时，将动态能量降低了 22-28%。使用我们的多目标优化方法，与最先进的技术相比，寿命延长了至少 36%，与未编码存储器相比，寿命延长了至少 50%，同时保持了节能和系统性能。

items.title: Detecting Qubit-coupling Faults in Ion-trap Quantum Computers.
items.abstract: Ion-trap quantum computers offer a large number of possible qubit couplings, each of which requires individual calibration and can be misconfigured. To enhance the duty cycle of an ion trap, we develop a strategy that diagnoses individual miscalibrated couplings using only log-many tests. This strategy is validated on a commercial ion-trap quantum computer, where we illustrate the process of debugging faulty quantum gates. Our methodology provides a scalable pathway towards fault detections on a larger scale ion-trap quantum computers, confirmed by simulations up to 32 qubits.
items.abstract_zh: 离子阱量子计算机提供大量可能的量子位耦合，每个耦合都需要单独校准并且可能会被错误配置。为了提高离子阱的占空比，我们开发了一种策略，仅使用对数测试来诊断单个错误校准的耦合。该策略在商用离子阱量子计算机上得到了验证，我们在其中说明了调试有缺陷的量子门的过程。我们的方法提供了一种在更大规模离子阱量子计算机上进行故障检测的可扩展途径，并通过高达 32 个量子位的模拟得到证实。

items.title: MULTI-CLOCK: Dynamic Tiering for Hybrid Memory Systems.
items.abstract: The rapid growth of i-memory computing powered by data-intensive applications has increased demand for DRAM in servers. However, a DRAM-based system can be limiting for modern workloads because of its capacity, cost, and power consumption characteristics. Hybrid memory systems, which consist of different types of memory, such as DRAM and persistent memory, can help address many of these limitations. One promising direction that has been explored in the recent literature involves introducing persistent memory devices as a second memory tier that is directly exposed to the CPU. The resulting tiered memory design must address the fundamental challenge of placing the right data in the right memory tier at the right time while minimizing overhead. We present MULTI -CLOCK, an efficient, low-overhead hybrid memory system that relies on a unique page selection technique for tier placement. MULTl-CLOCK’s page selection captures both page access recency and frequency, and enables moving pages to appropriate tiers at the right time within hybrid memory systems. We implemented a Linux-based, NUMA-aware version of MULTI-CLOCK that is entirely transparent and backward compatible with any existing application. Our evaluation with diverse real-world applications such as graph processing and key-value stores shows that MULTI -CLOCK can improve the average throughput by as much as 352% when compared with several state-of-the-art techniques for tiered memory.
items.abstract_zh: 由数据密集型应用程序驱动的内存计算的快速增长增加了服务器对 DRAM 的需求。然而，由于容量、成本和功耗特性，基于 DRAM 的系统可能会限制现代工作负载。混合内存系统由不同类型的内存（例如 DRAM 和持久内存）组成，可以帮助解决许多这些限制。最近文献中探索的一个有希望的方向涉及引入持久内存设备作为直接暴露给 CPU 的第二内存层。由此产生的分层内存设计必须解决基本挑战，即在正确的时间将正确的数据放置在正确的内存层中，同时最大限度地减少开销。我们推出了 MULTI-CLOCK，这是一种高效、低开销的混合内存系统，它依赖于独特的页面选择技术来进行层放置。 MULTl-CLOCK 的页面选择捕获页面访问新近度和频率，并能够在混合内存系统中的正确时间将页面移动到适当的层。我们实现了基于 Linux、NUMA 感知的 MULTI-CLOCK 版本，该版本完全透明且向后兼容任何现有应用程序。我们对图形处理和键值存储等各种实际应用程序的评估表明，与几种最先进的分层内存技术相比，MULTI-CLOCK 可以将平均吞吐量提高多达 352%。

items.title: Reliability-Aware Runahead.
items.abstract: Decreasing voltage levels and continued transistor scaling have drastically increased the chance of a processor bit encountering a soft error. We find that the microarchitecture state in an out-of-order core is vulnerable to soft errors especially while waiting for data to return from memory. The severity of the problem is further aggravated by the increasingly large size of microarchitecture state with every new processor generation. Prior solutions are ineffective as they incur too high overhead in terms of chip area, energy consumption and/or performance.In this paper, we make the observation that runahead execution, which was originally conceived to improve performance, also improves soft-error reliability as an unintended side effect. While the state-of-the-art runahead technique, Precise Runahead Execution (PRE), leads to substantial performance improvements, reliability is suboptimal still. We propose Reliability-Aware Runahead (RAR) which substantially improves soft-error reliability over the current state-of-the-art by rendering the microarchitecture state non-vulnerable during runahead execution and by initiating runahead execution early. Across a set of memory-intensive applications — the primary target for runahead execution — RAR improves the mean-time-to-failure (MTTF) by on average 4.8× (and up to 35.8×) relative to an out-of-order baseline while at the same time improving performance by 33.5% on average (and up to 2.6×). Across a broader set of compute- and memory-intensive benchmarks, RAR improves MTTF by on average 2.5× while at the same time improving performance by 11.9% on average. We explore the runahead design space and conclude that RAR is the only design point that improves both reliability and performance by such a significant margin. We find that RAR is more effective for increasingly large processor architectures, making RAR an effective microarchitecture technique for future high-reliability high-performance microprocessors.
items.abstract_zh: 降低电压水平和持续缩小晶体管尺寸大大增加了处理器位遇到软错误的机会。我们发现，无序内核中的微架构状态很容易出现软错误，尤其是在等待数据从内存返回时。随着每一代新处理器的微架构状态尺寸越来越大，问题的严重性进一步加剧。先前的解决方案是无效的，因为它们在芯片面积、能耗和/或性能方面产生过高的开销。在本文中，我们观察到，最初旨在提高性能的预运行执行也提高了软错误可靠性，这是一种意想不到的副作用。虽然最先进的超前运行技术“精确超前运行”(PRE) 可带来显着的性能改进，但可靠性仍然不够理想。我们提出了可靠性感知运行先行（RAR），它通过使微架构状态在先行执行期间不易受到攻击并尽早启动先行执行，大大提高了当前最先进技术的软错误可靠性。在一组内存密集型应用程序（超前执行的主要目标）中，相对于乱序基线，RAR 将平均故障时间 (MTTF) 提高了 4.8 倍（最高可达 35.8 倍），同时将性能平均提高了 33.5%（最高可达 2.6 倍）。在更广泛的计算和内存密集型基准测试中，RAR 将 MTTF 平均提高了 2.5 倍，同时将性能平均提高了 11.9%。我们探索了超前运行设计空间并得出结论，RAR 是唯一能够大幅提高可靠性和性能的设计点。我们发现 RAR 对于日益大型的处理器架构更加有效，使得 RAR 成为未来高可靠性高性能微处理器的有效微架构技术。

items.title: Saving PAM4 Bus Energy with SMOREs: Sparse Multi-level Opportunistic Restricted Encodings.
items.abstract: Pulse Amplitude Modulation (PAM) uses multiple voltage levels as different data symbols, transferring multiple bits of data simultaneously, thereby enabling higher communication bandwidth without increased operating frequencies. However, dividing the voltage into more symbols leads to a smaller voltage difference between adjacent symbols, making the interface more vulnerable to crosstalk and power noise. GDDR6X adopts four-level symbols (PAM4) with Maximum Transition Avoidance (MTA) coding, which reduces the effects of crosstalk. However, current coding approaches can consume excess energy and produce excess power noise. This paper introduces novel energy reduction techniques for PAM interfaces, specifically demonstrating them for GDDR6X PAM4. Inspired by prior work on conventional single-ended I/O interfaces, we leverage the unused idle periods in DRAM channels between data transmissions to apply longer but more energy-efficient codes. To maximize the energy savings, we build multiple sparse encoding schemes to fit different sized gaps in the DRAM traffic. These sparse encodings can provide energy reductions of up to 52% when transferring 4-bit data using a 3-symbol sequence. We evaluate these coding techniques using an NVIDIA RTX 3090 baseline, a recent GPU which uses GDDR6X with PAM4 signaling. Our evaluation shows the opportunity for large energy savings at the DRAM I/O interface (28.2% on average) over many HPC/DL applications with minimal performance degradation.
items.abstract_zh: 脉冲幅度调制（PAM）使用多个电压电平作为不同的数据符号，同时传输多个数据位，从而在不增加工作频率的情况下实现更高的通信带宽。然而，将电压分成更多符号会导致相邻符号之间的电压差更小，从而使接口更容易受到串扰和电源噪声的影响。 GDDR6X采用四级符号（PAM4）和最大转移避免（MTA）编码，减少串扰的影响。然而，当前的编码方法会消耗过多的能量并产生过多的功率噪声。本文介绍了 PAM 接口的新型节能技术，特别针对 GDDR6X PAM4 进行了演示。受到传统单端 I/O 接口先前工作的启发，我们利用数据传输之间 DRAM 通道中未使用的空闲周期来应用更长但更节能的代码。为了最大限度地节省能源，我们构建了多种稀疏编码方案来适应 DRAM 流量中不同大小的间隙。当使用 3 符号序列传输 4 位数据时，这些稀疏编码可将能量降低高达 52%。我们使用 NVIDIA RTX 3090 基准（一种使用 GDDR6X 和 PAM4 信号传输的最新 GPU）来评估这些编码技术。我们的评估显示，与许多 HPC/DL 应用程序相比，DRAM I/O 接口有机会大幅节能（平均 28.2%），同时性能下降最小。

items.title: HeteroGen: Automatic Synthesis of Heterogeneous Cache Coherence Protocols.
items.abstract: We solve the two challenges architects face when designing heterogeneous processors with cache coherent shared memory. First, we develop an automated tool, called HeteroGen, for composing clusters of cores, each with its own coherence protocol. Second, we show that the output of HeteroGen adheres to a precisely defined memory consistency model that we call a compound consistency model. For a wide variety of protocols—including the MOESI variants, as well as those that are targeted towards Total Store Order and Release Consistency—we show that HeteroGen can correctly fuse them. To validate HeteroGen, we develop the first litmus tests for verifying that heterogeneous protocols satisfy compound consistency models. To understand the possible performance implications of automatic protocol generation, we compared against a publicly available manually-generated heterogeneous protocol. Our results show that performance is comparable.
items.abstract_zh: 我们解决了架构师在设计具有缓存一致性共享内存的异构处理器时面临的两个挑战。首先，我们开发了一个名为 HeteroGen 的自动化工具，用于组成核心集群，每个核心都有自己的一致性协议。其次，我们表明 HeteroGen 的输出遵循精确定义的内存一致性模型，我们称之为复合一致性模型。对于各种协议（包括 MOESI 变体，以及针对总存储订单和发布一致性的协议），我们表明 HeteroGen 可以正确地融合它们。为了验证 HeteroGen，我们开发了第一个试金石来验证异构协议满足复合一致性模型。为了了解自动协议生成可能对性能产生的影响，我们与公开可用的手动生成的异构协议进行了比较。我们的结果表明性能具有可比性。

items.title: NVMExplorer: A Framework for Cross-Stack Comparisons of Embedded Non-Volatile Memories.
items.abstract: The current computing landscape is dominated by data-intensive applications, making data movement one of the most prominent performance bottlenecks. With repeated off-chip memory access to DRAM driving up power, and SRAM technology scaling and leakage power limiting the efficiency of embedded memories, there is a need for new memory systems that can enable denser, more energy-efficient future on-chip storage. The actively expanding field of emerging, embeddable non-volatile memory (eNVM) technologies is providing many potential candidates to satisfy this need. However, eNVM cell technologies are in vastly different stages of development and introduce distinct trade-offs in terms of density, read, write, and reliability characteristics.We present NVMExplorer (http://nvmexplorer.seas.harvard.edu/): a cross-stack design space exploration framework to compare and evaluate future on-chip memory solutions with system constraints and application-level impacts in-the-loop. This work uses NVMExplorer to evaluate eNVM-based storage for a range of application and system contexts including machine learning on the edge, graph analytics, and general purpose cache. Additionally, NVMExplorer provides an interactive and easily navigable set of data visualizations, which allow users to quickly answer their specific questions regarding eNVMs, filter according to system and application constraints, and efficiently iterate and refine the design space.
items.abstract_zh: 当前的计算领域以数据密集型应用程序为主，这使得数据移动成为最突出的性能瓶颈之一。由于对 DRAM 的重复片外存储器访问会增加功耗，而 SRAM 技术的扩展和泄漏功耗限制了嵌入式存储器的效率，因此需要新的存储器系统来实现更密集、更节能的未来片上存储。新兴嵌入式非易失性存储器 (eNVM) 技术领域的积极扩展为满足这一需求提供了许多潜在的候选技术。然而，eNVM 单元技术处于截然不同的发展阶段，并在密度、读取、写入和可靠性特性方面引入了不同的权衡。我们推出了 NVMExplorer (http://nvmexplorer.seas.harvard.edu/)：一个跨堆栈设计空间探索框架，用于比较和评估未来片上存储器解决方案与系统约束和应用级环内影响。这项工作使用 NVMExplorer 来评估一系列应用程序和系统环境中基于 eNVM 的存储，包括边缘机器学习、图形分析和通用缓存。此外，NVMExplorer 还提供了一组交互式且易于导航的数据可视化，使用户能够快速回答有关 eNVM 的特定问题，根据系统和应用程序限制进行筛选，并有效地迭代和完善设计空间。

items.title: IR-ORAM: Path Access Type Based Memory Intensity Reduction for Path-ORAM.
items.abstract: Path ORAM is an effective ORAM (Oblivious RAM) primitive for protecting memory access patterns. Path ORAM converts each off-chip memory request from user program to tens to hundreds of memory accesses. While several schemes have been proposed to mitigate the total number of memory accesses, Path ORAM remains a highly memory intensive primitive that leads to large memory bandwidth occupation and performance degradation.In this paper, we propose IR-ORAM to reduce the memory intensity based on path access types in Path ORAM. Path accesses in Path ORAM, while being kept oblivious to ensure privacy protection, can be categorized to three types: paths for requested data blocks, paths for position map blocks, and dummy paths. We develop a set of techniques to reduce the memory intensity of each type while ensuring the obliviousness at the same time — we reduce the number of data blocks to access for each tree path, reduce the number of path accesses for position maps, and convert many dummy path accesses to early write-backs of dirty data in LLC. Our experimental results show that IR-ORAM achieves on average 42% performance improvement over the state-of-the-art while effectively enforcing the memory access obliviousness and the same level of security protection.
items.abstract_zh: Path ORAM 是一种有效的 ORAM (Oblivious RAM) 原语，用于保护内存访问模式。路径 ORAM 将用户程序的每个片外存储器请求转换为数十到数百次存储器访问。虽然已经提出了几种方案来减少内存访问总数，但 Path ORAM 仍然是一种高度内存密集型原语，会导致大量内存带宽占用和性能下降。在本文中，我们提出 IR-ORAM 来根据 Path ORAM 中的路径访问类型来减少内存强度。 Path ORAM 中的路径访问虽然为了确保隐私保护而被忽视，但可以分为三种类型：请求数据块的路径、位置图块的路径和虚拟路径。我们开发了一套技术来减少每种类型的内存强度，同时确保遗忘性——我们减少每个树路径要访问的数据块数量，减少位置图的路径访问数量，并将许多虚拟路径访问转换为 LLC 中脏数据的早期写回。我们的实验结果表明，IR-ORAM 的性能比最先进的技术平均提高了 42%，同时有效地增强了内存访问的遗忘性和相同级别的安全保护。

items.title: VAQEM: A Variational Approach to Quantum Error Mitigation.
items.abstract: Variational Quantum Algorithms (VQA) are one of the most promising candidates for near-term quantum advantage. Traditionally, these algorithms are parameterized by rotational gate angles whose values are tuned over iterative execution on quantum machines. The iterative tuning of these gate angle parameters make VQAs more robust to a quantum machine’s noise profile. However, the effect of noise is still a significant detriment to VQA’s target estimations on real quantum machines — they are far from ideal. Thus, it is imperative to employ effective error mitigation strategies to improve the fidelity of these quantum algorithms on near-term machines.While existing error mitigation techniques built from theory do provide substantial gains, the disconnect between theory and real machine execution characteristics limit the scope of these improvements. Thus, it is critical to optimize mitigation techniques to explicitly suit the target application as well as the noise characteristics of the target machine.We propose VAQEM, which dynamically tailors existing error mitigation techniques to the actual, dynamic noisy execution characteristics of VQAs on a target quantum machine. We do so by tuning specific features of these mitigation techniques similar to the traditional rotation angle parameters -by targeting improvements towards a specific objective function which represents the VQA problem at hand. In this paper, we target two types of error mitigation techniques which are suited to idle times in quantum circuits: single qubit gate scheduling and the insertion of dynamical decoupling sequences. We gain substantial improvements to VQA objective measurements — a mean of over 3x across a variety of VQA applications, run on IBM Quantum machines.More importantly, while we study two specific error mitigation techniques, the proposed variational approach is general and can be extended to many other error mitigation techniques whose specific configurations are hard to select a priori. Integrating more mitigation techniques into the VAQEM framework in the future can lead to further formidable gains, potentially realizing practically useful VQA benefits on today’s noisy quantum machines.
items.abstract_zh: 变分量子算法（VQA）是近期量子优势最有希望的候选算法之一。传统上，这些算法通过旋转门角度进行参数化，其值通过量子机上的迭代执行进行调整。这些门角参数的迭代调整使 VQA 对量子机的噪声分布更加稳健。然而，噪声的影响仍然严重损害 VQA 对真实量子机器的目标估计——它们远非理想。因此，必须采用有效的错误缓解策略来提高这些量子算法在近期机器上的保真度。虽然根据理论构建的现有错误缓解技术确实提供了实质性的收益，但理论与实际机器执行特性之间的脱节限制了这些改进的范围。因此，优化缓解技术以明确适应目标应用程序以及目标机器的噪声特征至关重要。我们提出了 VAQEM，它根据目标量子机器上 VQA 的实际动态噪声执行特征动态定制现有的错误缓解技术。我们通过调整这些缓解技术的特定功能来实现这一点，类似于传统的旋转角度参数 - 通过针对代表当前 VQA 问题的特定目标函数进行改进。在本文中，我们针对两种适合量子电路空闲时间的错误缓解技术：单量子位门调度和动态解耦序列的插入。我们在 VQA 客观测量方面取得了重大改进——在 IBM Quantum 机器上运行的各种 VQA 应用程序的平均值超过 3 倍。更重要的是，虽然我们研究了两种特定的错误缓解技术，但所提出的变分方法是通用的，可以扩展到许多其他错误缓解技术，而这些技术的具体配置很难先验选择。未来将更多缓解技术集成到 VAQEM 框架中可以带来进一步的巨大收益，有可能在当今嘈杂的量子机器上实现实用的 VQA 优势。

items.title: LoopPoint: Checkpoint-driven Sampled Simulation for Multi-threaded Applications.
items.abstract: Generic multi-threaded sampled simulation has been a long-standing, challenging problem with the potential to help change how researchers study modern, complex computing systems. Yet, a practical solution for reducing complex multi-threaded applications into a representative sample has been elusive. Existing techniques either do not provide significant speedups to be useful (Time-based Sampling techniques can show less than a 10× speedup compared to a fully-detailed simulation) or apply only to particular synchronization types (BarrierPoint for barrier-based workloads). In addition, workload-specific solutions can be rigid with respect to region selection, which can limit the overall simulation speedup when regions are large. A solution is needed that both supports generic multi-threaded applications, no matter the synchronization primitives used, as well as allows for ease of deployment and fast evaluation.In this work, we aim to solve these challenges and propose a novel sampling technique for multi-threaded applications, called LoopPoint, that is both agnostic to the type of synchronization primitives used and scales by the similarity exhibited by the application. The proposed methodology combines several vital features, including (1) repeatable, up-front application analysis, (2) a novel clustering approach to take into account run-time parallelism, and (3) the use of loop-based simulation markers to divide the work into measurable chunks, even in the presence of spin-loops. LoopPoint identifies representative simulation regions that can be simulated in parallel to achieve speedups of up to 801× for the train input set of the multi-threaded SPEC CPU2017 benchmarks with an average simulation error of just 2.33%. For the ref inputs of CPU2017, we calculate the speedup with LoopPoint to be 11,587× on average (for parallel simulation), and up to 31,253×, demonstrating how the identification of application regularity and loops can lead to significant simulation improvements compared to state-of-the-art solutions.
items.abstract_zh: 通用多线程采样模拟一直是一个长期存在的、具有挑战性的问题，有可能帮助改变研究人员研究现代复杂计算系统的方式。然而，将复杂的多线程应用程序简化为代表性示例的实用解决方案一直难以实现。现有技术要么无法提供显着的加速（与完全详细的模拟相比，基于时间的采样技术可以显示出不到 10 倍的加速），要么仅适用于特定的同步类型（用于基于屏障的工作负载的 BarrierPoint）。此外，特定于工作负载的解决方案在区域选择方面可能很严格，这可能会在区域较大时限制整体模拟加速。需要一种解决方案，无论使用何种同步原语，都支持通用多线程应用程序，并且易于部署和快速评估。在这项工作中，我们的目标是解决这些挑战，并提出一种名为 LoopPoint 的新型多线程应用程序采样技术，它既与所使用的同步原语的类型无关，又根据应用程序表现出的相似性进行扩展。所提出的方法结合了几个重要特征，包括（1）可重复的预先应用程序分析，（2）考虑运行时并行性的新颖聚类方法，以及（3）使用基于循环的模拟标记将工作划分为可测量的块，即使存在自旋循环。 LoopPoint 确定了可以并行模拟的代表性模拟区域，以便为多线程 SPEC CPU2017 基准测试的训练输入集实现高达 801 倍的加速，平均模拟误差仅为 2.33%。对于 CPU2017 的参考输入，我们计算出 LoopPoint 的加速比平均为 11,587 倍（对于并行仿真），最高可达 31,253 倍，展示了与最先进的解决方案相比，应用规律性和循环的识别如何带来显着的仿真改进。

items.title: Effective Mimicry of Belady's MIN Policy.
items.abstract: The past decade has seen the rise of highly successful cache replacement policies that are based on binary prediction. For example, the Hawkeye policy learns whether lines loaded by a given PC are Cache Friendly (likely to remain in the cache if Belady’s MIN policy had been used) or Cache Averse (likely to be evicted by Belady’s MIN policy). In this paper, we instead present a cache replacement policy that is based on multiclass prediction, which allows it to directly mimic Belady’s MIN policy in a surprisingly simple and effective way. Our policy uses a PC-based predictor to learn each cache line’s reuse distance; it then evicts lines based on their predicted time of reuse. We show that our use of multiclass prediction is more effective than binary prediction because it allows for a finer-grained ordering of cache lines during eviction and because it is more robust to prediction errors.Our empirical results show that our new policy, which we refer to as Mockingjay, outperforms the previous state-of-the-art on both single-core and multi-core platforms and both with and without a prefetcher. For example, with no prefetcher, on a mix of 100 multi-core workloads from the SPEC 2006, SPEC 2017, and GAP benchmark suites, Mockingjay sees an average improvement over LRU of 15.2%, compared to 7.6% for SHiP and 12.9% for Hawkeye. On a single-core platform, Mockingjay’s improvement over LRU is 5.7%, which approaches the 6.0% improvement of Belady MIN’s unrealizable policy. On a single-core platform (with a prefetcher) running the high-MPKI CVP workloads, Mockingjay’s improvement over LRU is 20.1%, compared to 13.4% for Hawkeye.
items.abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，基于二进制预测的非常成功的缓存替换策略不断兴起。例如，Hawkeye 策略了解给定 PC 加载的行是否是缓存友好型（如果使用了 Belady 的 MIN 策略，则可能保留在缓存中）还是缓存厌恶型（可能会被 Belady 的 MIN 策略驱逐）。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于多类预测的缓存替换策略，这使得它能够以一种令人惊讶的简单有效的方式直接模仿 Belady 的 MIN 策略。我们的策略使用基于 PC 的预测器来了解每个缓存行的重用距离；然后，它根据预测的重用时间驱逐线路。我们证明，我们使用多类预测比二进制预测更有效，因为它允许在驱逐期间对缓存行进行更细粒度的排序，并且对预测错误更稳健。我们的实证结果表明，我们的新策略（我们称为 Mockingjay）在单核和多核平台以及带和不带预取器的情况下都优于以前的最先进策略。例如，在没有预取器的情况下，在来自 SPEC 2006、SPEC 2017 和 GAP 基准套件的 100 个多核工作负载的混合上，Mockingjay 发现相对于 LRU 的平均改进为 15.2%，而 SHiP 为 7.6%，Hawkeye 为 12.9%。在单核平台上，Mockingjay 相对于 LRU 的改进为 5.7%，接近 Belady MIN 不可实现策略 6.0% 的改进。在运行高 MPKI CVP 工作负载的单核平台（带有预取器）上，Mockingjay 相对于 LRU 的改进为 20.1%，而 Hawkeye 为 13.4%。

items.title: HD-CPS: Hardware-assisted Drift-aware Concurrent Priority Scheduler for Shared Memory Multicores.
items.abstract: Efficiently exploiting parallelism remains a challenging problem in multicore processors. For many algorithms, executing tasks in some priority order results in a work-efficient execution. However, searching high-priority tasks requires communication that hampers performance. A concurrent priority scheduler (CPS) selects high-priority tasks and schedules them on different cores. Modern CPS designs offer various strategies to select high-priority tasks at low communication cost for improved performance. However, they do not explicitly track the priority of tasks and cannot adjust task distribution if the cores are processing low-priority tasks. Moreover, they cannot estimate the right amount of communication required to select high-priority tasks. This paper critically observes that the cores’ priority drift can be quantified and used for better performance. A novel CPS design, HD-CPS is proposed to use priority as a signal to optimize drift and communication at runtime. Furthermore, compute-intensive task transfer and processing aspects of the CPS are offloaded to per-core local hardware at a low cost to enhance performance. HD-CPS is shown to consistently improve performance over several state-of-the-art software-based and hardware-assisted CPS designs. With hardware-assist, it approaches near-linear performance scaling as a function of core counts for large shared-memory multicores.
items.abstract_zh: 有效利用并行性仍然是多核处理器中的一个具有挑战性的问题。对于许多算法来说，以某种优先级顺序执行任务可以实现高效的执行。然而，搜索高优先级任务需要进行通信，这会影响性能。并发优先级调度程序（CPS）选择高优先级任务并将它们调度到不同的内核上。现代 CPS 设计提供了各种策略来以低通信成本选择高优先级任务，从而提高性能。但是，它们不会显式跟踪任务的优先级，并且如果内核正在处理低优先级任务，则无法调整任务分配。此外，他们无法估计选择高优先级任务所需的适当通信量。本文批判性地指出，核心的优先级漂移可以量化并用于获得更好的性能。 HD-CPS 是一种新颖的 CPS 设计，旨在使用优先级作为信号来优化运行时的漂移和通信。此外，CPS 的计算密集型任务传输和处理方面以低成本卸载到每核本地硬件，以提高性能。与多种最先进的基于软件和硬件辅助的 CPS 设计相比，HD-CPS 已被证明能够持续提高性能。借助硬件辅助，它可以根据大型共享内存多核的核心数量实现近线性性能扩展。

items.title: The Specialized High-Performance Network on Anton 3.
items.abstract: Molecular dynamics (MD) simulation, a computationally intensive method that provides invaluable insights into the behavior of biomolecules, typically requires large-scale parallelization. Implementation of fast parallel MD simulation demands both high bandwidth and low latency for inter-node communication, but in current semiconductor technology, neither of these properties is scaling as quickly as intra-node computational capacity. This disparity in scaling necessitates architectural innovations to maximize the utilization of computational units. For Anton 3, the latest in a family of highly successful special-purpose supercomputers designed for MD simulations, we thus designed and built a completely new specialized network as part of our ASIC. Tightly integrating this network with specialized computation pipelines enables Anton 3 to perform simulations orders of magnitude faster than any general-purpose supercomputer, and to outperform its predecessor, Anton 2 (the state of the art prior to Anton 3), by an order of magnitude. In this paper, we present the three key features of the network that contribute to the high performance of Anton 3. First, through architectural optimizations, the network achieves very low end-to-end inter-node communication latency for fine-grained messages, allowing for better overlap of computation and communication. Second, novel application-specific compression techniques reduce the size of most messages sent between nodes, thereby increasing effective inter-node bandwidth. Lastly, a new hardware synchronization primitive, called a network fence, supports fast fine-grained synchronization tailored to the data flow within a parallel MD application. These application-driven specializations to the network are critical for Anton 3’s MD simulation performance advantage over all other machines.
items.abstract_zh: 分子动力学 (MD) 模拟是一种计算密集型方法，可为生物分子行为提供宝贵的见解，通常需要大规模并行化。快速并行 MD 仿真的实现需要节点间通信的高带宽和低延迟，但在当前的半导体技术中，这些特性都无法像节点内计算能力那样快速扩展。这种扩展上的差异需要架构创新来最大限度地利用计算单元。 Anton 3 是专为 MD 模拟而设计的非常成功的专用超级计算机系列中的最新产品，因此我们设计并构建了一个全新的专用网络作为 ASIC 的一部分。将该网络与专用计算管道紧密集成，使 Anton 3 执行模拟的速度比任何通用超级计算机快几个数量级，并且比其前身 Anton 2（Anton 3 之前的最先进技术）性能好一个数量级。在本文中，我们介绍了网络的三个关键特征，这些特征有助于 Anton 3 的高性能。首先，通过架构优化，网络为细粒度消息实现了非常低的端到端节点间通信延迟，从而允许计算和通信更好地重叠。其次，新颖的特定于应用程序的压缩技术减少了节点之间发送的大多数消息的大小，从而增加了有效的节点间带宽。最后，一种称为网络围栏的新硬件同步原语支持针对并行 MD 应用程序内的数据流定制的快速细粒度同步。这些应用程序驱动的网络专业化对于 Anton 3 相对于所有其他机器的 MD 模拟性能优势至关重要。

items.title: Griffin: Rethinking Sparse Optimization for Deep Learning Architectures.
items.abstract: This paper examines the design space trade-offs of DNNs accelerators aiming to achieve competitive performance and efficiency metrics for all four combinations of dense or sparse activation/weight tensors. To do so, we systematically examine the overheads of supporting sparsity on top of an optimized dense core. These overheads are modeled based on parameters that indicate how a multiplier can borrow a nonzero operation from the neighboring multipliers or future cycles. As a result of this exploration, we identify a few promising designs that perform better than prior work. Our findings suggest that even the best design targeting dual sparsity yields a 20%-30% drop in power efficiency when performing on single sparse models, i.e., those with only sparse weight or sparse activation tensors. We found that one can reuse resources of the same core to maintain high performance and efficiency when running single sparsity or dense models. We call this hybrid architecture Griffin. Griffin is 1.2, 3.0, 3.1, and 1.4x more power-efficient than state-of-the-art sparse architectures, for dense, weight-only sparse, activation-only sparse, and dual sparse models, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 本文研究了 DNN 加速器的设计空间权衡，旨在为密集或稀疏激活/权重张量的所有四种组合实现有竞争力的性能和效率指标。为此，我们系统地检查了在优化的密集核心之上支持稀疏性的开销。这些开销是根据指示乘法器如何从相邻乘法器或未来周期借用非零运算的参数来建模的。作为这次探索的结果，我们发现了一些有前途的设计，它们的性能比以前的工作更好。我们的研究结果表明，即使是针对双稀疏性的最佳设计，在单个稀疏模型（即仅具有稀疏权重或稀疏激活张量的模型）上执行时，功率效率也会下降 20%-30%。我们发现，在运行单一稀疏或密集模型时，可以重用同一核心的资源来保持高性能和效率。我们将这种混合架构称为 Griffin。对于密集、仅权值稀疏、仅激活稀疏和对偶稀疏模型，Griffin 的能效分别比最先进的稀疏架构高 1.2、3.0、3.1 和 1.4 倍。

items.title: RM-SSD: In-Storage Computing for Large-Scale Recommendation Inference.
items.abstract: To meet the strict service level agreement requirements of recommendation systems, the entire set of embeddings in recommendation systems needs to be loaded into the memory. However, as the model and dataset for production-scale recommendation systems scale up, the size of the embeddings is approaching the limit of memory capacity. Limited physical memory constrains the algorithms that can be trained and deployed, posing a severe challenge for deploying advanced recommendation systems. Recent studies offload the embedding lookups into SSDs, which targets the embedding-dominated recommendation models. This paper takes it one step further and proposes to offload the entire recommendation system into SSD with in-storage computing capability. The proposed SSD-side FPGA solution leverages a low-end FPGA to speed up both the embedding-dominated and MLP-dominated models with high resource efficiency. We evaluate the performance of the proposed solution with a prototype SSD. Results show that we can achieve 20-100× throughput improvement compared with the baseline SSD and 1.5-15× improvement compared with the state-of-art.
items.abstract_zh: 为了满足推荐系统严格的服务水平协议要求，推荐系统中的整套嵌入需要加载到内存中。然而，随着生产规模推荐系统的模型和数据集的扩大，嵌入的大小正在接近内存容量的极限。有限的物理内存限制了可以训练和部署的算法，这对部署高级推荐系统提出了严峻的挑战。最近的研究将嵌入查找卸载到 SSD 中，其目标是嵌入主导的推荐模型。本文更进一步，提出将整个推荐系统卸载到具有存储内计算能力的SSD中。所提出的 SSD 端 FPGA 解决方案利用低端 FPGA 来加速嵌入主导和 MLP 主导的模型，并具有高资源效率。我们使用原型 SSD 评估所提出解决方案的性能。结果表明，与基准 SSD 相比，我们可以实现 20-100 倍的吞吐量改进，与最先进的技术相比，可以实现 1.5-15 倍的吞吐量改进。

items.title: DRIPS: Dynamic Rebalancing of Pipelined Streaming Applications on CGRAs.
items.abstract: Coarse-grained reconfigurable arrays (CGRAs) provide higher flexibility than application-specific integrated circuits (ASICs) and higher efficiency than fine-grained reconfigurable devices such as Field Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGAs). However, CGRAs are generally designed to support offloading of a single kernel. While the CGRA design, based on communicating functional units, appears to naturally suit data streaming applications composed of multiple cooperating kernels, current approaches only statically partition the resources across application kernels. However, emerging streaming applications at the edge (scientific instruments, sensor networks, network processing) perform much more than digital signal processing and often are data and input dependent. This leads to extremely variable kernel execution times, severely impacting the throughput of the entire pipeline if resources are only statically allocated. Therefore, in this paper, we propose DRIPS — a novel CGRA architecture that can dynamically rebalance the pipeline of data-dependent streaming applications. We present a unified compiler framework to facilitate the mapping of a given streaming application onto the DRIPS CGRA architecture. The experimental results show that DRIPS achieves an average throughput improvement of 1.46× across a set of representative applications over a statically partitioned solution. The additional area overhead to enable dynamic rebalancing consumes 16.34% of the entire area for a 5×5 CGRA prototype.
items.abstract_zh: 粗粒度可重构阵列 (CGRA) 提供比专用集成电路 (ASIC) 更高的灵活性，比现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 等细粒度可重构器件提供更高的效率。然而，CGRA 通常被设计为支持单个内核的卸载。虽然基于通信功能单元的 CGRA 设计似乎自然适合由多个协作内核组成的数据流应用程序，但当前的方法仅跨应用程序内核静态地划分资源。然而，新兴的边缘流应用程序（科学仪器、传感器网络、网络处理）的性能远不止数字信号处理，而且通常依赖于数据和输入。这会导致内核执行时间变化极大，如果仅静态分配资源，则会严重影响整个管道的吞吐量。因此，在本文中，我们提出了 DRIPS——一种新颖的 CGRA 架构，可以动态地重新平衡数据依赖的流应用程序的管道。我们提出了一个统一的编译器框架，以方便将给定的流应用程序映射到 DRIPS CGRA 架构上。实验结果表明，与静态分区解决方案相比，DRIPS 在一组代表性应用程序中的平均吞吐量提高了 1.46 倍。对于 5×5 CGRA 原型，用于实现动态重新平衡的额外面积开销消耗了整个面积的 16.34%。

items.title: SupermarQ: A Scalable Quantum Benchmark Suite.
items.abstract: The emergence of quantum computers as a new computational paradigm has been accompanied by speculation concerning the scope and timeline of their anticipated revolutionary changes. While quantum computing is still in its infancy, the variety of different architectures used to implement quantum computations make it difficult to reliably measure and compare performance. This problem motivates our introduction of SupermarQ, a scalable, hardware-agnostic quantum benchmark suite which uses application-level metrics to measure performance. SupermarQ is the first attempt to systematically apply techniques from classical benchmarking methodology to the quantum domain. We define a set of feature vectors to quantify coverage, select applications from a variety of domains to ensure the suite is representative of real workloads, and collect benchmark results from the IBM, IonQ, and AQT@LBNL platforms. Looking forward, we envision that quantum benchmarking will encompass a large cross-community effort built on open source, constantly evolving benchmark suites. We introduce SupermarQ as an important step in this direction.
items.abstract_zh: 量子计算机作为一种新的计算范式的出现，伴随着对其预期革命性变化的范围和时间表的猜测。虽然量子计算仍处于起步阶段，但用于实现量子计算的各种不同架构使得可靠地测量和比较性能变得困难。这个问题促使我们推出 SupermarQ，这是一个可扩展的、与硬件无关的量子基准套件，它使用应用程序级指标来衡量性能。 SupermarQ 是系统地将经典基准测试方法论技术应用到量子领域的首次尝试。我们定义一组特征向量来量化覆盖范围，从各个领域选择应用程序以确保该套件能够代表真实的工作负载，并从 IBM、IonQ 和 AQT@LBNL 平台收集基准测试结果。展望未来，我们预计量子基准测试将包含基于开源、不断发展的基准套件的大型跨社区努力。我们推出 SupermarQ 作为朝这个方向迈出的重要一步。

items.title: QULATIS: A Quantum Error Correction Methodology toward Lattice Surgery.
items.abstract: Due to the high error rate of a qubit, detecting and correcting errors on it is essential for fault-tolerant quantum computing (FTQC). Surface code (SC) associated with its decoding algorithm is one of the most promising quantum error correction (QEC) methods because it has high fidelity and requires only nearest neighbor qubits connectivity. To realize FTQC, we need a decoder circuit capable of not only QEC in a 3-D lattice to deal with errors in measurement on ancillary qubits but also quantum operations on logically constructed qubits. Whereas several methods to perform logical operations on SC, such as lattice surgery (LS), are known, no practical decoders supporting them have been proposed yet.One of the most promising QC implementations today is made up of superconducting qubits that are located in a cryogenic environment. To reduce the hardware complexity of QC and latency of QEC, we are supposed to perform QEC in a cryogenic environment. Hence a power-efficient decoder is required due to the limited power budget inside a dilution refrigerator.In this paper, we propose an online-QEC algorithm that supports LS with a practical decoder circuit, as well as a new FTQC architecture. We design a key building block of the proposed architecture with a hybrid of SFQ- and Cryo-CMOS-based digital circuits and evaluate it with a SPICE-level simulation. Each logic element includes about 2400 Josephson junctions, and power consumption is estimated to be 2.07 μW when operating with a 2 GHz clock frequency. We evaluate the decoder performance by a quantum error simulator for an essential operation of LS with code distances up to 11, and it achieves a 0.6% accuracy threshold. In an LS-based architecture further supporting a magic-state distillation protocol, which is expected to run for near-term universal quantum computing, we evaluate the QEC performance and power consumption of the architecture and show that it is practical to be operated in 4-K temperature region of a dilution refrigerator.
items.abstract_zh: 由于量子位的错误率很高，检测和纠正其错误对于容错量子计算（FTQC）至关重要。与其解码算法相关的表面码（SC）是最有前途的量子纠错（QEC）方法之一，因为它具有高保真度并且仅需要最近邻量子位连接。为了实现 FTQC，我们需要一个解码器电路，不仅能够在 3-D 晶格中进行 QEC，以处理辅助量子位的测量误差，而且能够对逻辑构造的量子位进行量子操作。尽管已知有几种在 SC 上执行逻辑运算的方法，例如晶格手术 (LS)，但尚未提出支持它们的实用解码器。当今最有前途的 QC 实现之一是由位于低温环境中的超导量子位组成。为了降低QC的硬件复杂性和QEC的延迟，我们应该在低温环境中执行QEC。因此，由于稀释冰箱内的功率预算有限，因此需要高能效的解码器。在本文中，我们提出了一种在线QEC算法，该算法通过实用的解码器电路以及新的FTQC架构来支持LS。我们利用基于 SFQ 和 Cryo-CMOS 的数字电路的混合设计了所提出架构的关键构建模块，并通过 SPICE 级仿真对其进行了评估。每个逻辑元件包括约 2400 个约瑟夫森结，在 2 GHz 时钟频率下工作时功耗估计为 2.07 μW。我们通过量子误差模拟器评估了代码距离高达 11 的 LS 基本操作的解码器性能，并且达到了 0.6% 的准确度阈值。在基于 LS 的架构中，进一步支持魔态蒸馏协议，预计将在近期通用量子计算中运行，我们评估了该架构的 QEC 性能和功耗，并表明在稀释制冷机的 4-K 温度范围内运行是可行的。

items.title: QuantumNAS: Noise-Adaptive Search for Robust Quantum Circuits.
items.abstract: Quantum noise is the key challenge in Noisy Intermediate-Scale Quantum (NISQ) computers. Previous work for mitigating noise has primarily focused on gate-level or pulse-level noise-adaptive compilation. However, limited research has explored a higher level of optimization by making the quantum circuits themselves resilient to noise.In this paper, we propose QuantumNAS, a comprehensive framework for noise-adaptive co-search of the variational circuit and qubit mapping. Variational quantum circuits are a promising approach for constructing quantum neural networks for machine learning and variational ansatzes for quantum simulation. However, finding the best variational circuit and its optimal parameters is challenging due to the large design space and parameter training cost. We propose to decouple the circuit search from parameter training by introducing a novel SuperCircuit. The SuperCircuit is constructed with multiple layers of pre-defined parameterized gates (e.g., U3 and CU3) and trained by iteratively sampling and updating the parameter subsets (SubCircuits) of it. It provides an accurate estimation of SubCircuits performance trained from scratch. Then we perform an evolutionary co-search of SubCircuit and its qubit mapping. The SubCircuit performance is estimated with parameters inherited from SuperCircuit and simulated with real device noise models. Finally, we perform iterative gate pruning and finetuning to remove redundant gates in a fine-grained manner.Extensively evaluated with 12 quantum machine learning (QML) and variational quantum eigensolver (VQE) benchmarks on 14 quantum computers, QuantumNAS significantly outperforms noise-unaware search, human, random, and existing noise-adaptive qubit mapping baselines. For QML tasks, QuantumNAS is the first to demonstrate over 95% 2-class, 85% 4-class, and 32% 10-class classification accuracy on real quantum computers. It also achieves the lowest eigenvalue for VQE tasks on H<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</inf>, H<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</inf>O, LiH, CH<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">4</inf>, BeH<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</inf> compared with UCCSD baselines. We also open-source the TorchQuantum library for fast training of parameterized quantum circuits to facilitate future research.
items.abstract_zh: 量子噪声是噪声中尺度量子 (NISQ) 计算机的主要挑战。以前的降噪工作主要集中在门级或脉冲级噪声自适应编译。然而，有限的研究通过使量子电路本身具有抗噪声能力来探索更高水平的优化。在本文中，我们提出了 QuantumNAS，一种用于变分电路和量子位映射的噪声自适应协同搜索的综合框架。变分量子电路是构建用于机器学习的量子神经网络和用于量子模拟的变分分析的一种有前途的方法。然而，由于设计空间和参数训练成本较大，寻找最佳变分电路及其最佳参数具有挑战性。我们建议通过引入一种新颖的超级电路来将电路搜索与参数训练解耦。 SuperCircuit 由多层预定义参数化门（例如 U3 和 CU3）构成，并通过迭代采样和更新其参数子集（子电路）进行训练。它提供了对从头开始训练的子电路性能的准确估计。然后我们对 SubCircuit 及其量子位映射进行进化联合搜索。 SubCircuit 性能是使用从 SuperCircuit 继承的参数进行估计的，并使用真实器件噪声模型进行模拟。最后，我们执行迭代门修剪和微调，以细粒度的方式删除冗余门。在 14 台量子计算机上使用 12 个量子机器学习 (QML) 和变分量子本征求解器 (VQE) 基准进行了广泛评估，QuantumNAS 的性能显着优于无噪声搜索、人类、随机和现有的噪声自适应量子位映射基线。对于 QML 任务，QuantumNAS 率先在真实量子计算机上展示了超过 95% 的 2 类、85% 4 类和 32% 10 类分类精度。它还在 H<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</inf>、H<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" 上实现了 VQE 任务的最低特征值xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</inf>O、LiH、CH<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">4</inf>、BeH<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</inf> 与 UCCSD 基线相比。我们还开源了 TorchQuantum 库，用于快速训练参数化量子电路，以促进未来的研究。

items.title: Application Defined On-chip Networks for Heterogeneous Chiplets: An Implementation Perspective.
items.abstract: With the help of advanced packaging technologies to integrate multiple chips (e.g., CPU, AI, IO), a chiplet-based SoC design process can enable fast system construction. However, the design of network-on-chip used within the individual chiplets and across chiplets is an extremly challenge. We introduce the design process and methodology of a bufferless multi-ring NoC for heterogeneous chiplet-based SoC. Our design is portable and can be used in diverse scenarios, like Server-CPU, AI-Processor, and Baseband-Processor.The co-design of the application, architecture, and implementation is the key to make the system power efficient and high performance. We determined many architectural design choices by reflecting an analysis of a set of target applications by application teams and several physical implementation constraints provided by development teams. In this paper, we present the pragmatic practice of our co-design effort for the NoC. As a result, the system has been proven to achieve 16TB/s bandwidth in an AI processor and low latency, in a server CPU with nearly one hundred cores.
items.abstract_zh: 借助先进封装技术集成多个芯片（例如CPU、AI、IO），基于chiplet的SoC设计流程可以实现快速系统构建。然而，在各个小芯片内以及跨小芯片使用的片上网络的设计是一个极大的挑战。我们介绍了用于基于异构 Chiplet 的 SoC 的无缓冲多环 NoC 的设计流程和方法。我们的设计是可移植的，可用于多种场景，如服务器CPU、人工智能处理器和基带处理器。应用、架构和实现的协同设计是系统低功耗和高性能的关键。我们通过反映应用程序团队对一组目标应用程序的分析以及开发团队提供的几个物理实现约束来确定许多架构设计选择。在本文中，我们介绍了 NoC 协同设计工作的务实实践。结果，该系统已被证明可以在人工智能处理器中实现 16TB/s 的带宽，并在近百核的服务器 CPU 中实现低延迟。

items.title: Enabling Efficient Large-Scale Deep Learning Training with Cache Coherent Disaggregated Memory Systems.
items.abstract: Modern deep learning (DL) training is memory-consuming, constrained by the memory capacity of each computation component and cross-device communication bandwidth. In response to such constraints, current approaches include increasing parallelism in distributed training and optimizing inter-device communication. However, model parameter communication is becoming a key performance bottleneck in distributed DL training. To improve parameter communication performance, we propose COARSE, a disaggregated memory extension for distributed DL training. COARSE is built on modern cache-coherent interconnect (CCI) protocols and MPI-like collective communication for synchronization, to allow low-latency and parallel access to training data and model parameters shared among worker GPUs. To enable high bandwidth transfers between GPUs and the disaggregated memory system, we propose a decentralized parameter communication scheme to decouple and localize parameter synchronization traffic. Furthermore, we propose dynamic tensor routing and partitioning to fully utilize the non-uniform serial bus bandwidth varied across different cloud computing systems. Finally, we design a deadlock avoidance and dual synchronization to ensure high-performance parameter synchronization. Our evaluation shows that COARSE achieves up to 48.3% faster DL training compared to the state-of-the-art MPI AllReduce communication.
items.abstract_zh: 现代深度学习 (DL) 训练非常消耗内存，受到每个计算组件的内存容量和跨设备通信带宽的限制。为了应对这些限制，当前的方法包括增加分布式训练的并行性和优化设备间通信。然而，模型参数通信正在成为分布式深度学习训练的关键性能瓶颈。为了提高参数通信性能，我们提出了 COARSE，一种用于分布式深度学习训练的分解内存扩展。 COARSE 基于现代缓存一致性互连 (CCI) 协议和类似 MPI 的同步集体通信而构建，允许低延迟、并行访问工作 GPU 之间共享的训练数据和模型参数。为了实现 GPU 和分解内存系统之间的高带宽传输，我们提出了一种去中心化参数通信方案来解耦和本地化参数同步流量。此外，我们提出动态张量路由和分区，以充分利用不同云计算系统中不同的非均匀串行总线带宽。最后，我们设计了死锁避免和双同步以确保高性能的参数同步。我们的评估表明，与最先进的 MPI AllReduce 通信相比，COARSE 的深度学习训练速度提高了 48.3%。

items.title: Near-Stream Computing: General and Transparent Near-Cache Acceleration.
items.abstract: Data movement and communication have become the primary bottlenecks in large multicore systems. The near-data computing paradigm provides a solution: move computation to where the data resides on-chip. Two challenges keep near-data computing from the mainstream: lack of programmer transparency and applicability. Programmer transparency requires providing sequential memory semantics with distributed computation, which requires burdensome coordination. Broad applicability requires support for combinations of address patterns (e.g. affine, indirect, multi-operand) and computation types (loads, stores, reductions, atomics).We find that streams – coarse grain memory access patterns – are a powerful ISA abstraction for near data offloading. Tracking data access at stream-granularity heavily reduces the burden of coordination for providing sequential semantics. Decomposing the problem using streams means that arbitrary combinations of address and computation patterns can be combined for broad generality.With this insight, we develop a paradigm called near-stream computing, comprising a compiler, CPU ISA extension, and a microarchitecture that facilitate programmer transparent computation offloading to shared caches. We evaluate our system on OpenMP kernels that stress broad addressing and compute behavior, and find that 46% of dynamic instructions can be offloaded to remote banks, reducing the network traffic by 76%. Overall it achieves 2.13× speedup over a state-of-the-art near-data computing technique, with a 1.90× energy efficiency gain.
items.abstract_zh: 数据移动和通信已成为大型多核系统的主要瓶颈。近数据计算范式提供了一个解决方案：将计算转移到数据驻留在片上的位置。有两个挑战使近数据计算远离主流：缺乏程序员透明度和适用性。程序员透明度需要通过分布式计算提供顺序内存语义，这需要繁重的协调。广泛的适用性需要支持地址模式（例如仿射、间接、多操作数）和计算类型（加载、存储、缩减、原子）的组合。我们发现流（粗粒度内存访问模式）是近数据卸载的强大 ISA 抽象。以流粒度跟踪数据访问大大减轻了提供顺序语义的协调负担。使用流分解问题意味着可以组合地址和计算模式的任意组合以实现广泛的通用性。有了这种洞察力，我们开发了一种称为近流计算的范例，包括编译器、CPU ISA 扩展和微体系结构，有助于程序员透明地将计算卸载到共享缓存。我们在强调广泛寻址和计算行为的 OpenMP 内核上评估我们的系统，发现 46% 的动态指令可以卸载到远程库，从而将网络流量减少 76%。总体而言，它比最先进的近数据计算技术实现了 2.13 倍的加速，并具有 1.90 倍的能效增益。

items.title: Hardware-Accelerated Hypergraph Processing with Chain-Driven Scheduling.
items.abstract: Beyond ordinary graphs, hypergraphs are a graph representation to flexibly express complex multilateral relationships between entities. Hypergraph processing can be used to solve many real-world problems, e.g., machine learning, VLSI design, and image retrieval. Existing hypergraph processing systems handle a hypergraph in order of its hyperedge and vertex indices. This makes processing hypergraphs on generalpurpose architectures suffer significantly from excessive offchip memory accesses, most of which however are redundant in frequently accessing overlapped hyperedges and vertices, but the index-ordered scheduling destroys this potential locality.In this paper, we propose a novel Generate-Load-Apply (GLA) execution model to improve locality in hypergraph processing. The key insight of GLA is to use a concept of chain to characterize the overlapped feature of a hypergraph, exposing data reuse opportunities missed in existing hypergraph systems. The precondition of driving GLA model is to generate expected chains on the fly, but the software solution is so expensive that its overheads may outweigh the benefits achieved from the chain-driven scheduling. We further present ChGraph, the first hardware-accelerated hypergraph processing engine near each core. ChGraph is specialized in accelerating the chain generation and the chain-guided data loading (to hide memory access latency) while the general-purpose cores are responsible only for handling the apply operations of GLA. We evaluate ChGraph against a state-of-the-art hypergraph processing system Hygra on six hypergraph algorithms using five large real-world hypergraphs. Results on a simulated 16core system show that ChGraph reduces the number of offchip memory accesses by up to 4.56× and achieves up to 4.73× speedup while introducing only 0.26% area overhead.
items.abstract_zh: 除了普通图之外，超图是一种灵活表达实体之间复杂多边关系的图表示形式。超图处理可用于解决许多现实世界的问题，例如机器学习、VLSI 设计和图像检索。现有的超图处理系统按照超边和顶点索引的顺序处理超图。这使得通用架构上的处理超图受到过多的片外内存访问的严重影响，然而，其中大多数在频繁访问重叠的超边和顶点时是多余的，但索引排序调度破坏了这种潜在的局部性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的生成-加载-应用（GLA）执行模型来改善超图处理中的局部性。 GLA 的关键见解是使用链的概念来表征超图的重叠特征，揭示现有超图系统中错过的数据重用机会。驱动GLA模型的前提是动态生成预期的链，但软件解决方案非常昂贵，其开销可能超过链驱动调度所带来的好处。我们进一步介绍了 ChGraph，这是第一个靠近每个核心的硬件加速超图处理引擎。 ChGraph 专门用于加速链生成和链引导数据加载（以隐藏内存访问延迟），而通用内核仅负责处理 GLA 的应用操作。我们使用五个大型现实世界超图，在六种超图算法上针对最先进的超图处理系统 Hygra 来评估 ChGraph。模拟 16 核系统的结果表明，ChGraph 将片外存储器访问次数减少了高达 4.56 倍，并实现了高达 4.73 倍的加速，同时仅引入了 0.26% 的面积开销。

items.title: uSystolic: Byte-Crawling Unary Systolic Array.
items.abstract: General matrix multiply (GEMM) is an important operation in broad applications, especially the thriving deep neural networks. To achieve low power consumption for GEMM, researchers have already leveraged unary computing, which manipulates bitstreams with extremely simple logic. However, existing unary architectures are not well generalizable to varying GEMM configurations in versatile applications and incompatible to the binary computing stack, imposing challenges to execute unary GEMM effortlessly. In this work, we address the problem by architecting a hybrid unary-binary systolic array, uSystolic, to inherit the legacy-binary data scheduling with slow (thus power-efficient) data movement, i.e., data bytes are crawling out from memory to drive uSystolic. uSystolic exhibits tremendous area and power improvements as a joint effect of 1) low-power computing kernel, 2) spatial-temporal bitstream reuse, and 3) on-chip SRAM elimination. For the evaluated edge computing scenario, compared with the binary parallel design, the rated-coded uSystolic reduces the systolic array area and total on-chip area by 59.0% and 91.3%, with the on-chip energy and power efficiency improved by up to 112.2× and 44.8× for AlexNet.
items.abstract_zh: 通用矩阵乘法（GEMM）是广泛应用中的重要运算，尤其是蓬勃发展的深度神经网络。为了实现 GEMM 的低功耗，研究人员已经利用一元计算，它用极其简单的逻辑来操纵比特流。然而，现有的一元架构不能很好地推广到通用应用程序中不同的 GEMM 配置，并且与二进制计算堆栈不兼容，这给轻松执行一元 GEMM 带来了挑战。在这项工作中，我们通过构建一个混合一元-二进制脉动阵列 uSystolic 来解决这个问题，以继承传统的二进制数据调度，并进行缓慢（因此节能）的数据移动，即数据字节从内存中爬出以驱动 uSystolic。 uSystolic 在 1) 低功耗计算内核、2) 时空比特流重用和 3) 片上 SRAM 消除的共同作用下展现出巨大的面积和功耗改进。对于评估的边缘计算场景，与二进制并行设计相比，额定编码uSystolic将脉动阵列面积和片上总面积减少了59.0%和91.3%，AlexNet的片上能源和功率效率分别提高了112.2倍和44.8倍。

items.title: Upward Packet Popup for Deadlock Freedom in Modular Chiplet-Based Systems.
items.abstract: Monolithic SoCs can be decomposed into disparate chiplets that support integration with advanced pack-aging technologies. This concept is promising in reducing the manufacturing cost of large scale SoCs due to the higher yield rate and reusability of chiplets. The chiplets should be designed in a modular manner without holistic system knowledge so that they can be reused in different SoCs. However, the design modularity is a major challenge to the networks-on-chip (NoCs) of chiplets.New deadlocks may occur across both the chiplets and the interposer due to the integration, even if the NoC of each individually designed chiplet is deadlock free. However, conventional deadlock freedom approaches are unsuitable to handle such deadlocks because they require holistic knowledge and violate the modularity. Although there are several modular approaches that specifically target at integration-induced deadlocks, their routing is overly restricted and the injection control incurs additional latency. They also lack flexibility in dynamically changing topologies due to their complex software algorithm and the hard-wired components.In this paper, a key insight on the chiplet integration-induced deadlocks is gained, inspired by which a deadlock recovery framework (named UPP) is proposed. Specifically, it is verified that an integration-induced deadlock always involves a stalled upward packet moving from the interposer to the connected chiplet via the vertical link. Thus, UPP detects a deadlock by discovering the upward packet and recovers the system from deadlock by transmitting the upward packet to its destination. Hybrid flow control mechanisms are proposed to enable the upward packet to bypass the buffers and be transmitted via the normal router datapath. To guarantee the ejection of the upward packet after transmission, a lightweight protocol is proposed to reserve ejection queue entries of the network interface. Experimental results show that while adhering to design modularity, UPP provides an average runtime speedup of 3.1%∼10.3% with an area overhead of less than 4%.
items.abstract_zh: 单片 SoC 可以分解为不同的小芯片，支持与先进封装技术的集成。由于小芯片具有更高的良率和可重用性，这一概念有望降低大规模 SoC 的制造成本。小芯片应以模块化方式设计，无需整体系统知识，以便它们可以在不同的 SoC 中重复使用。然而，设计模块化是chiplet的片上网络(NoC)的主要挑战。即使每个单独设计的chiplet的NoC没有死锁，由于集成，在chiplet和中介层上也可能会出现新的死锁。然而，传统的死锁自由方法不适合处理此类死锁，因为它们需要整体知识并且违反了模块化性。尽管有几种专门针对集成引起的死锁的模块化方法，但它们的路由受到过度限制，并且注入控制会产生额外的延迟。由于其复杂的软件算法和硬连线组件，它们还缺乏动态改变拓扑的灵活性。 在本文中，获得了对小芯片集成引起的死锁的关键见解，并受其启发，提出了死锁恢复框架（称为 UPP）。具体而言，已验证集成引起的死锁总是涉及停滞的向上数据包通过垂直链路从中介层移动到连接的小芯片。因此，UPP通过发现上行数据包来检测死锁，并通过将上行数据包发送到其目的地来使系统从死锁中恢复。提出了混合流控制机制，以使上行数据包能够绕过缓冲区并通过正常的路由器数据路径进行传输。为了保证上行数据包在传输后被弹出，提出了一种轻量级协议来保留网络接口的弹出队列条目。实验结果表明，在坚持设计模块化的同时，UPP 的平均运行加速比为 3.1%∼10.3%，面积开销小于 4%。

items.title: SecNDP: Secure Near-Data Processing with Untrusted Memory.
items.abstract: Today’s data-intensive applications increasingly suffer from significant performance bottlenecks due to the limited memory bandwidth of the classical von Neumann architecture. Near-Data Processing (NDP) has been proposed to perform computation near memory or data storage to reduce data movement for improving performance and energy consumption. However, the untrusted NDP processing units (PUs) bring in new threats to workloads that are private and sensitive, such as private database queries and private machine learning inferences. Meanwhile, most existing secure hardware designs do not consider off-chip components trustworthy. Once data leaving the processor, they must be protected, e.g., via block cipher encryption. Unfortunately, current encryption schemes do not support computation over encrypted data stored in memory or storage, hindering the adoption of NDP techniques for sensitive workloads.In this paper, we propose SecNDP, a lightweight encryption and verification scheme for untrusted NDP devices to perform computation over ciphertext and verify the correctness of linear operations. Our encryption scheme leverages arithmetic secret sharing in secure Multi-Party Computation (MPC) to support operations over ciphertext, and uses counter-mode encryption to reduce the decryption latency. The security of the encryption and verification algorithm is formally proven. Compared with a non-NDP baseline, secure computation with SecNDP significantly reduces the memory bandwidth usage while providing security guarantees. We evaluate SecNDP for two workloads of distinct memory access patterns. In the setting of eight NDP units, we show a speedup up to 7.46× and energy savings of 18% over an unprotected non-NDP baseline, approaching the performance gain attained by native NDP without protection. Furthermore, SecNDP does not require any security assumption on NDP to hold, thus, using the same threat model as existing secure processors. SecNDP can be implemented without changing the NDP protocols and their inherent hardware design.
items.abstract_zh: 由于经典冯诺依曼架构的内存带宽有限，当今的数据密集型应用程序越来越受到严重的性能瓶颈的影响。近数据处理（NDP）已被提议在内存或数据存储附近执行计算，以减少数据移动，从而提高性能和能耗。然而，不受信任的 NDP 处理单元 (PU) 给私有和敏感的工作负载带来了新的威胁，例如私有数据库查询和私有机器学习推理。同时，大多数现有的安全硬件设计并不认为片外组件值得信赖。一旦数据离开处理器，就必须对其进行保护，例如通过块密码加密。不幸的是，当前的加密方案不支持对存储在内存或存储中的加密数据进行计算，这阻碍了 NDP 技术在敏感工作负载中的采用。在本文中，我们提出了 SecNDP，一种轻量级的加密和验证方案，用于不可信的 NDP 设备对密文进行计算并验证线性运算的正确性。我们的加密方案利用安全多方计算（MPC）中的算术秘密共享来支持密文操作，并使用计数器模式加密来减少解密延迟。加密和验证算法的安全性得到形式化证明。与非NDP基线相比，SecNDP安全计算在提供安全保证的同时，显着降低了内存带宽的使用。我们针对两种不同内存访问模式的工作负载评估 SecNDP。在八个 NDP 单元的设置中，与未受保护的非 NDP 基准相比，我们的速度提升高达 7.46 倍，节能 18%，接近无保护的本机 NDP 所获得的性能增益。此外，SecNDP 不需要对 NDP 进行任何安全假设，因此使用与现有安全处理器相同的威胁模型。 SecNDP可以在不改变NDP协议及其固有硬件设计的情况下实现。

items.title: Temporal Exposure Reduction Protection for Persistent Memory.
items.abstract: The long-living nature and byte-addressability of persistent memory (PM) amplifies the importance of strong memory protections. This paper develops temporal exposure reduction protection (TERP) as a framework for enforcing memory safety. Aiming to minimize the time when a PM region is accessible, TERP offers a complementary dimension of memory protection. The paper gives a formal definition of TERP, explores the semantics space of TERP constructs, and the relations with security and composability in both sequential and parallel executions. It proposes programming system and architecture solutions for the key challenges for the adoption of TERP, which draws on novel supports in both compilers and hardware to efficiently meet the exposure time target. Experiments validate the efficacy of the proposed support of TERP, in both efficiency and exposure time minimization.
items.abstract_zh: 持久内存 (PM) 的长寿命特性和字节寻址能力增强了强大的内存保护的重要性。本文开发了时间暴露减少保护（TERP）作为强制内存安全的框架。 TERP 旨在最大限度地减少可访问 PM 区域的时间，提供内存保护的补​​充维度。本文给出了 TERP 的正式定义，探讨了 TERP 结构的语义空间，以及顺序执行和并行执行中与安全性和可组合性的关系。它针对采用 TERP 的关键挑战提出了编程系统和架构解决方案，它利用编译器和硬件的新颖支持来有效地满足曝光时间目标。实验验证了所提议的 TERP 支持在效率和暴露时间最小化方面的功效。

items.title: ASAP: A Speculative Approach to Persistence.
items.abstract: Persistent memory enables a new class of applications that have persistent in-memory data structures. Recoverability of these applications imposes constraints on the ordering of writes to persistent memory. But, the cache hierarchy and memory controllers in modern systems may reorder writes to persistent memory. Therefore, programmers have to use expensive flush and fence instructions that stall the processor to enforce such ordering. While prior efforts circumvent stalling on long latency flush instructions, these designs under-perform in large-scale systems with many cores and multiple memory controllers.We propose ASAP, an architectural model in which the hardware takes an optimistic approach by persisting data eagerly, thereby avoiding any ordering stalls and utilizing the total system bandwidth efficiently. ASAP avoids stalling by allowing writes to be persisted out-of-order, speculating that all writes will eventually be persisted. For correctness, ASAP saves recovery information in the memory controllers which is used to undo the effects of speculative writes to memory in the event of a crash.Over a large number of representative workloads, ASAP improves performance over current Intel systems by 2.3 on average and performs within 3.9% of an ideal system.
items.abstract_zh: 持久内存支持具有持久内存数据结构的新型应用程序。这些应用程序的可恢复性对持久内存的写入顺序施加了限制。但是，现代系统中的缓存层次结构和内存控制器可能会对持久内存的写入重新排序。因此，程序员必须使用昂贵的刷新和栅栏指令来阻止处理器来强制执行这种排序。虽然之前的努力避免了长延迟刷新指令的停顿，但这些设计在具有多个内核和多个内存控制器的大型系统中表现不佳。我们提出了 ASAP，这是一种架构模型，其中硬件通过急切地持久保存数据来采取乐观的方法，从而避免任何排序停顿并有效地利用总系统带宽。 ASAP 通过允许无序持久化写入来避免停顿，推测所有写入最终都会被持久化。为了确保正确性，ASAP 将恢复信息保存在内存控制器中，用于在发生崩溃时消除推测性写入内存的影响。在大量代表性工作负载中，ASAP 的性能比当前 Intel 系统平均提高了 2.3，性能与理想系统的差距在 3.9% 以内。

items.title: ScalaGraph: A Scalable Accelerator for Massively Parallel Graph Processing.
items.abstract: Graph processing is promising to extract valuable insights in graphs. Nowadays, emerging 3D-stacked memories and silicon technologies can provide over terabytes per second memory bandwidth and thousands of processing elements (PEs) to meet the high hardware demand of graph applications. However, this leap in hardware capability does not result in a huge increase but even a degradation sometimes in performance for graph processing. In this paper, we discover that the centralized on-chip memory hierarchy adopted in existing graph accelerators is the villain causing poor scalability due to its quadratic increase of hardware overheads with respect to the number of PEs.We present a novel distributed on-chip memory hierarchy by leveraging the network-on-chip (NoC) to enable massively parallel graph processing. We architect ScalaGraph, a brand new graph processing accelerator, to exploit this insight. ScalaGraph adopts a software-hardware co-design to minimize NoC communication overheads via an efficient row-oriented dataflow mapping and runtime aggregation. A specialized scheduling mechanism is also proposed to improve load imbalance. Our results on a Xilinx Alveo U280 FPGA card show that ScalaGraph on a modest configuration of 512 PEs achieves 2.2× and 3.2× speedups over a state-of-theart graph accelerator GraphDyns and a GPU-based graph system Gunrock, respectively. Moreover, ScalaGraph enables supporting at least 1,024 PEs with nearly linear performance scaling while GraphDyns fails to work.
items.abstract_zh: 图处理有望从图中提取有价值的见解。如今，新兴的 3D 堆叠存储器和硅技术可以提供每秒超过 TB 的存储器带宽和数千个处理元件 (PE)，以满足图形应用程序的高硬件需求。然而，硬件能力的飞跃并没有带来巨大的提升，有时甚至会导致图处理性能的下降。在本文中，我们发现现有图形加速器中采用的集中式片上存储器层次结构是导致可扩展性较差的罪魁祸首，因为它的硬件开销相对于 PE 数量呈二次方增加。我们提出了一种新颖的分布式片上存储器层次结构，利用片上网络 (NoC) 来实现大规模并行图形处理。我们构建了 ScalaGraph，一个全新的图形处理加速器，来利用这种洞察力。 ScalaGraph 采用软硬件协同设计，通过高效的面向行的数据流映射和运行时聚合，最大限度地减少 NoC 通信开销。还提出了专门的调度机制来改善负载不平衡。我们在 Xilinx Alveo U280 FPGA 卡上的结果表明，在 512 个 PE 的适度配置上的 ScalaGraph 分别比最先进的图形加速器 GraphDyns 和基于 GPU 的图形系统 Gunrock 实现了 2.2 倍和 3.2 倍的加速。此外，ScalaGraph 能够以近乎线性的性能扩展支持至少 1,024 个 PE，而 GraphDyns 则无法工作。

items.title: ScaleHLS: A New Scalable High-Level Synthesis Framework on Multi-Level Intermediate Representation.
items.abstract: High-level synthesis (HLS) has been widely adopted as it significantly improves the hardware design productivity and enables efficient design space exploration (DSE). Existing HLS tools are built using compiler infrastructures largely based on a single-level abstraction, such as LLVM. How-ever, as HLS designs typically come with intrinsic structural or functional hierarchies, different HLS optimization problems are often better solved with different levels of abstractions. This paper proposes ScaleHLS <sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup>, a new scalable and customizable HLS framework, on top of a multi-level compiler infrastructure called MLIR. ScaleHLS represents HLS designs at multiple representation levels and provides an HLS-dedicated analysis and transform library to solve the optimization problems at the suitable levels. Using this library, we provide a DSE engine to generate optimized HLS designs automatically. In addition, we develop an HLS C front-end and a C/C++ emission back-end to translate HLS designs into/from MLIR for enabling an end-to-end compilation flow. Experimental results show that, comparing to the baseline designs without manual directives insertion and code-rewriting, that are only optimized by Xilinx Vivado HLS, ScaleHLS improves the performances with amazing quality-of-results – up to 768.1× better on computation kernel level programs and up to 3825.0× better on neural network models.
items.abstract_zh: 高级综合（HLS）已被广泛采用，因为它显着提高了硬件设计生产力并实现了高效的设计空间探索（DSE）。现有的 HLS 工具是使用主要基于单级抽象（例如 LLVM）的编译器基础架构构建的。然而，由于 HLS 设计通常具有内在的结构或功能层次结构，因此不同的 HLS 优化问题通常可以通过不同的抽象级别得到更好的解决。本文提出了 ScaleHLS <sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup>，这是一种新的可扩展和可定制的 HLS 框架，位于称为 MLIR 的多级编译器基础架构之上。 ScaleHLS代表多个表示级别的HLS设计，并提供HLS专用的分析和转换库来解决合适级别的优化问题。使用该库，我们提供了 DSE 引擎来自动生成优化的 HLS 设计。此外，我们还开发了 HLS C 前端和 C/C++ 发射后端，以将 HLS 设计转换为 MLIR 或从 MLIR 转换出来，从而实现端到端编译流程。实验结果表明，与没有手动指令插入和代码重写且仅通过 Xilinx Vivado HLS 优化的基线设计相比，ScaleHLS 提高了性能，结果质量令人惊叹 - 在计算内核级程序上提高了 768.1 倍，在神经网络模型上提高了 3825.0 倍。

items.title: Efficient Bad Block Management with Cluster Similarity.
items.abstract: Process variation in the 3D flash memory architecture raises the difficulty of bad block management. Since the error characteristics vary among different blocks, it is difficult for the existing P/E cycle-based bad block management policies to decide a suitable cycle threshold. This increases the possibility of data loss and decreases the SSD’s lifetime. In this work, we characterize the 3D flash memory and observe spatial correlation among flash blocks in the aspect of error behaviors. This phenomenon is referred to as cluster similarity. A novel cluster-based bad block management policy is proposed, which treats the failure of a block as an indicator of near-future failures of its neighboring blocks. Moreover, we provide quantitative methods to enable judicious selection of the cluster size to meet the desired tradeoff between the SSD lifetime and reliability. Compared with the commonly-used cycle-based bad block management policy, our cluster-based management policy has a lifetime improvement of 2x with comparable failure rates. And with comparable lifetime, the failure rate of the cycle-based policy is 9x higher than our method. To alleviate the I/O performance impact caused by the cluster retirement, we proposes a critical-block first reallocation scheduling. Our experiments show up to two times improvement of the 95th percentile latency compared to the naive scheduling of cluster reallocation.
items.abstract_zh: 3D闪存架构中的工艺变化增加了坏块管理的难度。由于不同块的错误特征不同，现有的基于P/E周期的坏块管理策略很难确定合适的周期阈值。这会增加数据丢失的可能性并缩短 SSD 的使用寿命。在这项工作中，我们描述了 3D 闪存的特征，并观察闪存块之间在错误行为方面的空间相关性。这种现象称为聚类相似性。提出了一种新颖的基于集群的坏块管理策略，该策略将块的故障视为其相邻块近期故障的指标。此外，我们还提供定量方法来明智地选择簇大小，以满足 SSD 寿命和可靠性之间所需的权衡。与常用的基于周期的坏块管理策略相比，我们的基于集群的管理策略在故障率相当的情况下，寿命提高了 2 倍。在相当的生命周期内，基于周期的策略的失败率比我们的方法高 9 倍。为了减轻集群退役对 I/O 性能的影响，我们提出了关键块优先重新分配调度。我们的实验表明，与集群重新分配的简单调度相比，第 95 个百分点的延迟提高了两倍。

items.title: GCoD: Graph Convolutional Network Acceleration via Dedicated Algorithm and Accelerator Co-Design.
items.abstract: Graph Convolutional Networks (GCNs) have emerged as the state-of-the-art graph learning model. However, it can be notoriously challenging to inference GCNs over large graph datasets, limiting their application to large real-world graphs and hindering the exploration of deeper and more sophisticated GCN graphs. This is because real-world graphs can be extremely large and sparse. Furthermore, the node degree of GCNs tends to follow the power-law distribution and therefore have highly irregular adjacency matrices, resulting in prohibitive inefficiencies in both data processing and movement and thus substantially limiting the achievable GCN acceleration efficiency. To this end, this paper proposes a GCN algorithm and accelerator Co-Design framework dubbed GCoD which can largely alleviate the aforementioned GCN irregularity and boost GCNs’ inference efficiency. Specifically, on the algorithm level, GCoD integrates a split and conquer GCN training strategy that polarizes the graphs to be either denser or sparser in local neighborhoods without compromising the model accuracy, resulting in graph adjacency matrices that (mostly) have merely two levels of workload and enjoys largely enhanced regularity and thus ease of acceleration.
